This document describes the development and release schedule for Python 3.14. ## Release schedule. * 3.14.0 alpha 1: Tuesday, 2024-10-15. * 3.14.0 beta 3: Tuesday, 2025-06-17. * 3.14.0 beta 4: Tuesday, 2025-07-08. * 3.14.0 candidate 1: Tuesday, 2025-07-22. * 3.14.0 final: Tuesday, 2025-10-07. ### Bugfix releases. * 3.14.1: Tuesday, 2025-12-02. * 3.14.3: Tuesday, 2026-02-03. * 3.14.4: Tuesday, 2026-04-07. * 3.14.5: Tuesday, 2026-06-09. * 3.14.6: Tuesday, 2026-08-04. * 3.14.7: Tuesday, 2026-10-06. * 3.14.8: Tuesday, 2026-12-01. * 3.14.9: Tuesday, 2027-02-02. * 3.14.10: Tuesday, 2027-04-06. * 3.14.11: Tuesday, 2027-06-01. * 3.14.12: Tuesday, 2027-08-03. * 3.14.13: Tuesday, 2027-10-05 (Final regular bugfix release with binary installers). Around the time of the release of 3.16.0 final, the final 3.14 bugfix update will be released.
